prompt:
Simplify PR #449 by removing the vpn-watchdog timer and service. Keep ONLY:

1. The Gluetun health check port mapping (9999:9999)
2. The Podman health-cmd options on the Gluetun container
3. The BindsTo + After systemd overrides for podman-qbittorrent and podman-sabnzbd

Remove everything under the '6. VPN Health Monitoring & Auto-Recovery' comment that relates to the watchdog — specifically:
- Delete the entire systemd.services.vpn-watchdog block (lines ~284-317 in the PR)
- Delete the entire systemd.timers.vpn-watchdog block (lines ~319-327 in the PR)
- Keep the BindsTo/After overrides and the section comment

The file is modules/media-server/default.nix. After editing, verify the nix config builds with:
nix build .#nixosConfigurations.classic-laddie.config.system.build.toplevel --no-link --dry-run 2>&1 | tail -5

Run tests if any exist. Update the PR description to reflect the simplified scope.
